name: Montresor

abilities.name: Demise (Eternal)
abilities.text: Once per turn. When this model is killed, it may discard a card. If it does so, it heals 4.

abilities.name: Suffocating
abilities.text: When an enemy model with a friendly upgrade attached activates within 6" of this model, it must discard a card or gain a Slow token.

abilities.name: U Terrifying
abilities.text: Enemy attack actions that target this model suffer a (-) to their duel.

actions.name: The Noose Tightens
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If the target has a friendly upgrade attached, this model receives +(c) to its final duel total.

triggers.name: Devastating Strike
triggers.text: When resolving, reduce this action's raise value to 3.

triggers.name: Catch a Glimpse
triggers.text: Look at the top two cards of your fate deck, then place them back in the same order.

triggers.name: Execute
triggers.text: The target may either discard a card or drain a (fortitude). If it does neither, it is killed.

actions.name: Toss the Noose
actions.effects: Target gains a Slow token. For each raise this action receives, move the target up to 2" toward this model.

triggers.name: Pull and Drag
triggers.text: Move the target 3" toward this model.

actions.name: Cursed to Watch
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Non-master ally only. This action cannot target the same model more than once per activation.

extraction_notes: Catch a Glimpse trigger has a book icon but no specific suit symbol visible - marked as null
Execute trigger appears to have a crow suit icon but is partially obscured - marked as null to be safe
